scripts.setup-backend: cd backend && python -m venv venv && venv\Scripts\activate && pip install flask flask_cors mysql-connector-python requests
scripts.setup-backend-mac: cd backend && python3 -m venv venv && source venv/bin/activate && pip install flask flask_cors mysql-connector-python requests
scripts.clean: node -e "const fs=require('fs');const path=require('path');function walk(dir){for(const f of fs.readdirSync(dir)){const p=path.join(dir,f);if(fs.statSync(p).isDirectory()){if(f==='__pycache__'){fs.rmSync(p,{recursive:true,force:true});console.log('removed',p);}else{walk(p);}}else if(f.endsWith('.pyc')){fs.rmSync(p,{force:true});console.log('removed',p);}}}walk(process.cwd());"
scripts.test: cd backend && venv\Scripts\activate && cd src && python -m pytest
scripts.test-unix: cd backend && source venv/bin/activate && python -m unittest discover -s tests
